query:
UPDATE issue_comment_reactions
               SET emoji = CASE WHEN $2 THEN $3 ELSE emoji END
               WHERE id = $1
               RETURNING id         as "id!: Uuid",
                         comment_id as "comment_id!: Uuid",
                         user_id    as "user_id!: Uuid",
                         emoji,
                         created_at as "created_at!: DateTime<Utc>"
